pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Switch maven-compiler-plugin configuration from source/target to release flag for modern JDK compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' for JDK 9+; while not strictly a compile error on JDK 21, it is the required modern pattern for cross-compilation or specific release targeting.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set scope to provided for jakarta.annotation-api as it is typically provided by the servlet container or Spring Boot starter.
Update lombok version to a newer release compatible with Java 21.
Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a newer snapshot/release.
Update javax.annotation-api version property (likely kept for backward compatibility or other deps, though the main dep moved to Jakarta).
